archetype: 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Customized with Deep Rust Accent
rationale: B2B Dashboards require extreme clarity, authority, and data density. Breaking away from typical 'SaaS Blue', a Deep Rust/Terracotta accent introduces a physical, industrial feel suitable for wholesale/inventory domains, while stark white spaces and sharp borders maintain the Swiss brutalist precision required for complex workflows.

rules: Headings (Cabinet Grotesk) MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Maintain strict hierarchy: H1 (text-4xl to 5xl max) for dashboard headers, H4 (text-lg) for widget headers.

admin_dashboard.spacing: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) to maximize data density.
admin_dashboard.container: Cards/Widgets must be flat solid surfaces with 1px border (border-border). NO muddy shadows. Max radius 8px (rounded-lg) or 0px.
admin_dashboard.alignment: Strict grid hierarchy. Left-align dense tabular data and inputs.

sales_agent_mobile.container: Cards can have a slight lift (shadow-sm) to feel tactile on mobile. Focus on scannability for product catalogs and quick order entry on-site.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-md. Solid primary color for main CTA. High contrast hover states.
components.tables: Dense rows. Sticky headers. Use subtle alternating row backgrounds (bg-black/5) or clear 1px bottom borders for scanability.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components but heavily customize. 1px border. Never use native inputs. Active states must have high contrast rings.
components.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use primary rust and grayscale tones. Avoid rainbow palettes. Use heat maps for stock levels (Green/Yellow/Red).

icons.rationale: Best for dense dashboards and developer/B2B tools.

motion.interactions: Minimalist. Subtle border color changes on hover. No bouncy scales.
motion.transitions: Quick opacity fades (0.15s) for modals and dropdowns.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA/WCAG AA standards. Primary color buttons must use white text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

image_urls.description: Bright modern warehouse featuring pallets and storage racks for logistics
Pile of cardboard boxes stacked in a storage area
A large pile of brown cardboard boxes

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn components and Tailwind with the exact colors defined above.
2. Implement 3 distinct views based on JWT role: Admin (full dashboard), Employee (orders/inventory), Sales Agent (mobile-first product catalog and order entry).
3. Dashboard Grid: Build a 2x4 KPI grid on the overview. Follow standard B2B SaaS layout with a left sidebar (60% width) for charts and right panel for activity/feeds.
4. Mobile Interface: For the Sales Agent view, force a mobile-friendly layout (large buttons, bottom navigation, card-based catalog).
5. Avoid generic Vercel aesthetic. Enforce the Swiss flat design with 1px borders and Deep Rust accents.
6. Include Recharts for Sales and Inventory analytics.
7. DO NOT USE placeholder text for images; strictly map from the media.image_urls provided.
